name: NVIDIA Jetson
description: NVIDIA Jetson is a family of embedded AI computing platforms designed specifically for robotics, autonomous machines, and edge AI. The range spans from Jetson Orin Nano (40 TOPS AI performance, ~$300 AUD) to Jetson AGX Orin (275 TOPS, ~$2,500 AUD). Jetson modules combine ARM CPUs with NVIDIA GPU cores and dedicated AI accelerators, enabling real-time deep learning inference on the robot itself — no cloud connection required. They run NVIDIA's JetPack SDK, which includes CUDA, cuDNN, TensorRT, and ROS 2 support.
whyUseIt: Modern robots increasingly rely on deep learning for perception — object detection, semantic segmentation, depth estimation, natural language processing. These models require GPU acceleration that a Raspberry Pi cannot provide. Jetson brings NVIDIA GPU power to the edge, enabling robots to run complex vision models at 30+ FPS while consuming under 30 watts. It is the standard platform for autonomous mobile robots, drones with on-board AI, and any robot that needs real-time neural network inference in the field.
